tools.name: batch_execute
tools.description: Execute multiple operations in a single MCP call to reduce round-trip latency.

tools.name: browser_launch
tools.description: Launch a browser instance. Call this before any other browser operations.

tools.name: browser_quit
tools.description: Close the browser and cleanup resources.

tools.name: cdp_clear_cpu_emulation
tools.description: Clear CPU emulation and restore normal speed.

tools.name: cdp_clear_network_emulation
tools.description: Clear network emulation and restore normal conditions.

tools.name: cdp_emulate_network
tools.description: Emulate network conditions (Slow 3G, Fast 3G, 4G, Offline, or custom).

tools.name: cdp_enable_console_debugger
tools.description: Enable enhanced console debugging with stack traces.

tools.name: cdp_get_browser_logs
tools.description: Get browser logs including deprecations, interventions, and violations.

tools.name: cdp_get_console_entries
tools.description: Get console messages with full stack traces.

tools.name: cdp_get_performance_metrics
tools.description: Get Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) and navigation timing metrics.

tools.name: cdp_get_response_body
tools.description: Get the response body for a specific network request by ID.

tools.name: cdp_install_extension
tools.description: Install a Chrome extension from a local path.

tools.name: cdp_run_lighthouse
tools.description: Run Lighthouse audit for performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices.

tools.name: cdp_start_coverage
tools.description: Start collecting JavaScript and CSS code coverage.

tools.name: cdp_stop_coverage
tools.description: Stop coverage collection and return the coverage report.

tools.name: cdp_take_heap_snapshot
tools.description: Capture a V8 heap snapshot for memory profiling.

tools.name: cdp_uninstall_extension
tools.description: Uninstall a Chrome extension by ID.

tools.name: config_get
tools.description: Get the resolved MCP server configuration.

tools.name: console_get_messages
tools.description: Get console messages from the page.

tools.name: dialog_get
tools.description: Get information about the current dialog.

tools.name: dialog_handle
tools.description: Handle a browser dialog (alert, confirm, prompt, beforeunload).

tools.name: element_clear
tools.description: Clear the content of an input element.

tools.name: element_click
tools.description: Click an element by CSS selector.

tools.name: element_dispatch_event
tools.description: Dispatch a DOM event on an element.

tools.name: element_double_click
tools.description: Double-click an element by CSS selector.

tools.name: element_drag_to
tools.description: Drag an element to another element.

tools.name: element_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate JavaScript with an element context.

tools.name: element_fill
tools.description: Clear an input and fill it with text (replaces existing content).

tools.name: element_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields at once.

tools.name: element_get_attribute
tools.description: Get an attribute value from an element.

tools.name: element_get_bounding_box
tools.description: Get the bounding box of an element.

tools.name: element_get_inner_html
tools.description: Get the innerHTML of an element.

tools.name: element_get_inner_text
tools.description: Get the innerText of an element.

tools.name: element_get_label
tools.description: Get the accessible label of an element.

tools.name: element_get_outer_html
tools.description: Get the outerHTML of an element.

tools.name: element_get_role
tools.description: Get the ARIA role of an element.

tools.name: element_get_text
tools.description: Get the text content of an element.

tools.name: element_get_value
tools.description: Get the value of an input element.

tools.name: element_is_checked
tools.description: Check if a checkbox/radio is checked.

tools.name: element_is_editable
tools.description: Check if an element is editable.

tools.name: element_is_enabled
tools.description: Check if an element is enabled.

tools.name: element_is_hidden
tools.description: Check if an element is hidden.

tools.name: element_is_visible
tools.description: Check if an element is visible.

tools.name: element_press
tools.description: Press a key on an element (e.g., Enter, Tab, ArrowDown).

tools.name: element_set_files
tools.description: Set files on a file input element.

tools.name: element_type
tools.description: Type text into an input element (appends to existing content).

tools.name: frame_select
tools.description: Switch to a frame by name or URL pattern.

tools.name: frame_select_main
tools.description: Switch back to the main frame.

tools.name: human_pause
tools.description: Pause automation for human interaction (CAPTCHA, login, etc.).

tools.name: http_request
tools.description: Make HTTP requests in the browser context with session cookies.

tools.name: input_mouse_drag
tools.description: Drag from one point to another.

tools.name: js_add_style
tools.description: Inject CSS styles into the page.

tools.name: js_init_script
tools.description: Add JavaScript that runs before page scripts on every navigation.

tools.name: network_route
tools.description: Register a mock response for requests matching a URL pattern.

tools.name: network_set_offline
tools.description: Set the browser's network state for offline mode testing.

tools.name: network_unroute
tools.description: Remove a previously registered route handler.

tools.name: page_emulate_media
tools.description: Emulate CSS media features (colorScheme, reducedMotion, forcedColors, contrast).

tools.name: page_pdf
tools.description: Generate a PDF of the page.

tools.name: page_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page or a specific element in a direction.

tools.name: storage_delete_cookie
tools.description: Delete a specific cookie by name.

tools.name: storage_local_get
tools.description: Get a value from localStorage by key.

tools.name: storage_local_list
tools.description: List all keys and values in localStorage.

tools.name: storage_session_get
tools.description: Get a value from sessionStorage by key.

tools.name: storage_session_list
tools.description: List all keys and values in sessionStorage.

tools.name: test_generate_locator
tools.description: Generate a locator string for a given element.

tools.name: test_verify_list
tools.description: Verify that a list of text items are all visible.

tools.name: test_verify_text
tools.description: Verify element text matches expected value.

tools.name: test_verify_value
tools.description: Verify that an input element has the expected value.

tools.name: trace_chunk_start
tools.description: Start a new trace chunk within an active trace.

tools.name: trace_group_start
tools.description: Start a trace group for logical grouping of actions.

tools.name: trace_start
tools.description: Start trace recording with screenshots and DOM snapshots.

tools.name: trace_stop
tools.description: Stop trace recording and save or return the trace data.

tools.name: video_stop
tools.description: Stop video recording and save the file.

tools.name: wait_for_function
tools.description: Wait for a JavaScript function to return truthy.

tools.name: wait_for_load
tools.description: Wait for a load state (load, domcontentloaded, networkidle).

tools.name: wait_for_selector
tools.description: Wait for element to appear/disappear with state option.

tools.name: wait_for_state
tools.description: Wait for an element to reach a state (visible, hidden, attached, detached).

tools.name: wait_for_text
tools.description: Wait for text to appear on the page.

tools.name: wait_for_url
tools.description: Wait for URL to match a pattern.
